basic_details.job_title: HPSC District Manager Recruitment 2026: Apply Online for 2 Posts in HSWC
basic_details.post_name: District Manager (Group-B) in Haryana State Warehousing Corporation
basic_details.short_information: Haryana Public Service Commission (HPSC) has released Advertisement No. 24/2026 on 10.07.2026 inviting online applications for 2 posts of District Manager (Group-B) in the Haryana State Warehousing Corporation. Online applications open on 15.07.2026 and close on 04.08.2026 up to 05:00 PM. Interested and eligible candidates can apply through the official website http://hpsc.gov.in.

application_fee.1_fee: Persons of Haryana with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) with at least 40% disability
application_fee.2_fee: OSC, DSC, BC-A (Non-Creamy Layer), BC-B (Non-Creamy Layer), ESM, EWS and women candidates of Haryana
application_fee.3_fee: DESM candidates of Haryana belonging to their vertical category, i.e. OSC, DSC, BC-A (Non-Creamy Layer), BC-B (Non-Creamy Layer), ESM, EWS of Haryana
application_fee.4_fee: DESM candidates of Haryana belonging to UR category
application_fee.details: Fee is payable through online mode (Net Banking, Debit Card, and Credit Card) up to 05:00 PM of the closing date. Fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances. Applications without the prescribed fee (unless remission is claimed) shall be summarily rejected.

age_limit.details: Note: Age relaxation for DSC/OSC/BC-A (Non-Creamy Layer)/BC-B (Non-Creamy Layer)/ESM category candidates is admissible only where the posts are reserved for that category. The upper age limit for any category (except Ex-servicemen) availing relaxation shall not exceed 52 years.

qualification.details: Nationality: Candidates must be a citizen of India, a subject of Nepal, a subject of Bhutan, a Tibetan refugee who came to India before 1 January 1962 with the intention of permanently settling in India, or a person of Indian origin who has migrated from Pakistan, Burma, Sri Lanka, East African countries of Kenya, Uganda, the United Republic of Tanzania, Zambia, Malawi, Zaire, Ethiopia, and Vietnam with the intention of permanently settling in India. The eligibility of a candidate with regard to age, educational qualifications, and experience shall be determined on the closing date fixed for submission of online application forms. No certificate or document issued after the closing date will be accepted by the Commission at any stage of the selection process. Part-time experience will not be considered. Only experience acquired after the minimum essential qualification will be considered. Candidates shall declare/disclose all pending FIRs, criminal cases, allegations of misconduct, disciplinary proceedings, investigations, and civil cases known to them. The Matriculation certificate or equivalent academic certificate is the only acceptable document for evidence of age/date of birth.

vacancy_details.Name of Post: District Manager (Group-B) in Haryana State Warehousing Corporation

post_wise_breakdown.name_of_post: District Manager (Group-B) in Haryana State Warehousing Corporation

category_wise_vacancy.Name of Post: District Manager (Group-B) in Haryana State Warehousing Corporation

selection_process: HPSC follows a three-stage recruitment process: Screening Test followed by Subject Knowledge Test and Interview. If the number of applications is large
the Commission may shortlist candidates using any one of the following methods:
Percentage of marks in the minimum educational qualification prescribed Percentage of marks in different educational qualifications with weightage decided by the Commission Desirable qualifications

if prescribed Higher educational qualifications than the minimum/essential qualification Higher experience in the relevant field than the minimum prescribed Counting experience before or after acquisition of minimum/essential qualifications A Screening Test and/or Subject Knowledge Test
The Commission may also decide to hold a Subject Knowledge Test and Interview directly
without a Screening Test. The decision of the Commission on the exam pattern is final and binding.
how_to_apply: Register online by visiting http://hpsc.gov.in. No other means or mode of submission of application will be accepted.
Register using Mobile Number and Aadhar Number. If Aadhar Card data is not updated, apply using Mobile Number.
A login ID will be created after registration.
Apply against the advertisement, as per your qualifications, using your login ID.
If applying using Aadhar Number, ensure that Aadhar Card data is updated, as it will be verified from the relevant site.
Submit the application after making payment of the requisite fee.
After making payment, take a printout of the application form and upload it after duly checking and signing it.
Ensure the signed copy of the downloaded application form is uploaded, failing which the application will be considered incomplete and automatically rejected.
Carefully enter all particulars, as no change will be allowed after final submission.

rows.name_of_post: District Manager (Group-B) in Haryana State Warehousing Corporation

content_sections.heading: HPSC District Manager Recruitment 2026: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Note: Age relaxation for DSC/OSC/BC-A (Non-Creamy Layer)/BC-B (Non-Creamy Layer)/ESM category candidates is admissible only where the posts are reserved for that category. The upper age limit for any category (except Ex-servicemen) availing relaxation shall not exceed 52 years.

rows.category: Disabled persons covered under RPWD Act, 2016
rows.age_relaxation: 5 years (+5 years if PwBD applicant belongs to S/Castes, S/Tribe, B/Classes, EWS category, subject to maximum of 52 years) for Group A and B posts where recruitment is made through open competitive examination

rows.category: Wife of military personnel disabled while in military service
Judicially separated women residing separately for more than two years from the prescribed date
Ex-servicemen (including Short Service Commissioned Officers and Emergency Commissioned Officers)
rows.age_relaxation: Relaxation equal to military service rendered plus three years, subject to conditions specified in the notification

rows.category: Persons who have already worked/are working on adhoc/contract/work-charged/daily wages basis in a Haryana Government Department/Board/Corporation, including Government-aided institutions
rows.age_relaxation: Relaxation equal to completed years of such service, excluding breaks, subject to a maximum age of 52 years and other conditions in the notification

content_sections.heading: HPSC District Manager Recruitment 2026: Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: Graduate in Agriculture, Commerce, Biology, Economics, or Chemistry with ten years' experience in handling and preservation of agricultural produce in a managerial capacity in a Government Department, Public Sector Undertaking, or a Commercial Organization of repute, on a post carrying pay scale equivalent to Assistant Manager (Quality Control) (PB-2, 9300-34800+4000, Pay Level-6) in the Corporation. Post-graduates require seven years' experience. Preference is given to candidates holding an MBA (Marketing) degree. Hindi or Sanskrit up to Matriculation, or 10+2/B.A./M.A. with Hindi as one of the subjects. Note: Qualifications for each post are as per the relevant Service Rules. Equivalent qualification claims will not be considered unless specified in the relevant Service Rules.

content_sections.heading: HPSC District Manager Recruitment 2026: Exam Pattern and Selection Process
content_sections.text: Generally, HPSC follows a three-stage recruitment process: Screening Test followed by Subject Knowledge Test and Interview . If the number of applications is large, the Commission may shortlist candidates using any one of the following methods: Percentage of marks in the minimum educational qualification prescribed Percentage of marks in different educational qualifications with weightage decided by the Commission Desirable qualifications, if prescribed Higher educational qualifications than the minimum/essential qualification Higher experience in the relevant field than the minimum prescribed Counting experience before or after acquisition of minimum/essential qualifications A Screening Test and/or Subject Knowledge Test The Commission may also decide to hold a Subject Knowledge Test and Interview directly, without a Screening Test. The decision of the Commission on the exam pattern is final and binding.

content_sections.heading: HPSC District Manager Recruitment 2026: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Fee is payable through online mode (Net Banking, Debit Card, and Credit Card) up to 05:00 PM of the closing date. Fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances. Applications without the prescribed fee (unless remission is claimed) shall be summarily rejected.

rows.category_of_candidates: Persons of Haryana with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) with at least 40% disability
OSC, DSC, BC-A (Non-Creamy Layer), BC-B (Non-Creamy Layer), ESM, EWS and women candidates of Haryana
DESM candidates of Haryana belonging to their vertical category, i.e. OSC, DSC, BC-A (Non-Creamy Layer), BC-B (Non-Creamy Layer), ESM, EWS of Haryana
DESM candidates of Haryana belonging to UR category

content_sections.heading: HPSC District Manager Recruitment 2026: Reservation Policy
content_sections.text: The benefit of reservation is given only to DSC/OSC/BC-A (Non-Creamy Layer)/BC-B (Non-Creamy Layer)/EWS/PwBD category candidates who are Residents/Domiciles of Haryana State. BC-A/BC-B candidates who fall within the Creamy Layer as per Haryana Government notification No. 40/13/2024-1SW dated 16.07.2024 are not eligible for reservation benefit and must apply under the General category. Scheduled Caste candidates must submit the latest DSC/OSC certificate as per notification No. 22/163/2024-5HR-II dated 13.11.2024. Women candidates seeking reservation must submit the caste certificate issued from the parental (father's) side only; certificates from the in-laws' (husband's) side will not be entertained. BC-A (Non-Creamy Layer)/BC-B (Non-Creamy Layer) and EWS certificates must be issued on or before the closing date, valid for the financial year 2026-27 (1 April 2026 to 31 March 2027), and issued after 01.04.2026. Candidates of reserved categories of Haryana for which no post is reserved/available can apply against General/UR category posts, fulfilling all General category eligibility conditions except fee, and must attach a scanned copy of their Caste Certificate and Resident of Haryana Certificate for fee concession. Reservation benefit under ESM/DESM category is as per Haryana Government notification No. 01/10/2021-2HR-III dated 25.05.2026. 2% reservation for children/grandchildren of Freedom Fighters (FF/DFF) of Haryana is admissible as per notification Nos. 22/49/2021-1GS-III dated 27.10.2021 and 26.04.2022, subject to conditions specified in the notification.

content_sections.heading: HPSC District Manager Recruitment 2026: Documents Required
content_sections.text: Scanned photo of the candidate Scanned signature of the candidate Scanned copies of degrees and mark sheets of educational qualifications Scanned copy of DSC/OSC certificate (as per notification No. 22/163/2024-5HR-II dated 13.11.2024) Scanned copy of BC-A (Non-Creamy Layer)/BC-B (Non-Creamy Layer) certificate Scanned copy of EWS certificate valid for 2026-2027 Scanned copy of DESM certificate for the year 2026-27 Scanned copy of ESM/DFF certificate Scanned copy of PwBD certificate (for PwBD candidates) Scanned copy of Aadhar card Scanned copy of Haryana Resident/Domicile Certificate (if availing reservation benefits) Scanned copy of Experience Certificate issued by Competent Authority Scanned copy of NOC from Department (for Haryana Government employees who have signed a bond) Scanned copy of proof of having worked on adhoc/contract/work-charged/daily wages basis (for candidates claiming age relaxation) Scanned copy of disability certificate in case of Disabled ESM

content_sections.heading: Other Important Eligibility Conditions
content_sections.text: Nationality: Candidates must be a citizen of India, a subject of Nepal, a subject of Bhutan, a Tibetan refugee who came to India before 1 January 1962 with the intention of permanently settling in India, or a person of Indian origin who has migrated from Pakistan, Burma, Sri Lanka, East African countries of Kenya, Uganda, the United Republic of Tanzania, Zambia, Malawi, Zaire, Ethiopia, and Vietnam with the intention of permanently settling in India. The eligibility of a candidate with regard to age, educational qualifications, and experience shall be determined on the closing date fixed for submission of online application forms. No certificate or document issued after the closing date will be accepted by the Commission at any stage of the selection process. Part-time experience will not be considered. Only experience acquired after the minimum essential qualification will be considered. Candidates shall declare/disclose all pending FIRs, criminal cases, allegations of misconduct, disciplinary proceedings, investigations, and civil cases known to them. The Matriculation certificate or equivalent academic certificate is the only acceptable document for evidence of age/date of birth.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in HPSC District Manager Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 02 vacancies for the post of District Manager (Group-B) in Haryana State Warehousing Corporation.

faq.question: Q2. When can I apply online for HPSC District Manager Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Online applications can be submitted from 15.07.2026 to 04.08.2026 up to 05:00 PM.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for HPSC District Manager Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must not be less than 25 years and not more than 45 years as on the closing date, i.e. 04.08.2026, subject to age relaxation for eligible categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the pay scale for the District Manager post?
faq.answer: The pay scale is 9300-34800+GP 5400 (Level-9).

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for HPSC District Manager Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The fee ranges from NIL for eligible PwBD candidates to ₹250/- for OSC/DSC/BC-A/BC-B (Non-Creamy Layer)/ESM/EWS/women candidates of Haryana, and ₹1000/- for DESM (UR category) and all remaining candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: A Graduate in Agriculture, Commerce, Biology, Economics, or Chemistry with ten years' managerial experience (seven years for post-graduates) in handling and preservation of agricultural produce, plus Hindi/Sanskrit up to Matriculation or equivalent.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for HPSC District Manager Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Generally a three-stage process: Screening Test, Subject Knowledge Test, and Interview. The Commission may also directly hold a Subject Knowledge Test and Interview without a Screening Test.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for HPSC District Manager Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through www.hpsc.gov.in by registering with Mobile Number/Aadhar Number, filling the application form, paying the fee, and uploading a signed printout of the submitted application.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any relaxation in the upper age limit?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is available for Scheduled Castes, Backward Classes, PwBD candidates, widowed/divorced/unmarried women, Ex-servicemen, and persons who have worked on adhoc/contract/work-charged/daily wages basis in Haryana Government, as detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I get help if I face issues while applying online?
faq.answer: Candidates can contact the HPSC Technical Helpline at 1800-1800-431 or email [email protected] on any working day between 10:00 hrs and 16:00 hrs.
